item.title: Scores for 2026-04-03
item.description: Pot limit Omaha Hi-Lo Place User Points 1 Norma1 12,000 2 Maryjean 10,000 3 PaPaLarry 8,000 4 Nana_Sharon 6,000 5 Kevin 4,000 6 bill 2,000 7 JoAnnmeme 1,000 8 patc 500 Month Point Totals Place User Points 1 Norma1 12,000 2 Maryjean 10,000 3 PaPaLarry 8,000 4 Nana_Sharon 6,000 5 Kevin 4,000 6 bill 2,000 7 JoAnnmeme 1,000 8 patc 500
